summary: Successor epoch after three F0 no-advance closes in 2026-07-15-viable-path. The first frozen within-symbol event-time continuation experiment advanced only F0 to pooled F1/L0. The next and only candidate action is the unchanged one-shot untouched holdout; prior closed families remain quarantined and option pricing remains forbidden unless F2 advances.
mechanism_lane: time-series 20-session breakout continuation with a conditional bounded positive-delta debit expression
primary_evidence_class: within-symbol prior-only matched event study with untouched chronological holdout

discovery_bar.purpose: Signal-only progress for F0→F1 and F1→F2 on labeled proxy or claim-appropriate data
required: train before untouched holdout when claiming F2
discovery_bar.notes: Discovery survivors are research signals only until the capital-seat bar clears; proxy-only or underlying-only evidence cannot grant paper eligibility.

capital_seat_bar.purpose: L1 sim edge / paper-path eligibility for the $3k sleeve
required: defined-risk preferred or explicit worst-case bound fitting sleeve
non-vacuous after-cost edge on dual cost axes
B3 density / multi-regime evidence appropriate to claim
competitive max-loss and window DD versus absolute gates
proxy-only or underlying-only evidence cannot earn L1

ken_soft_research_prior.text: Prefer exploring small repeatable profits from time decay and price swings while preserving a positive long-term directional bias; TSLA/TSLL high-beta liquid options are welcome when capital-fit, not as a plumbing tunnel.

prior_epoch.disposition: burst stopped; closed families remain quarantined

epoch_success_definition: Advance MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 from F1_TRAIN to F2_UNTOUCHED_HOLDOUT under the unchanged pooled discovery gate, or close the exact family; no option stage or capital seat unless F2 first advances.
epoch_closed_families_from_prior: ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_POLICY_F0: exact ONE_RISK_UNIT_CADENCE_PCS_V1 global-one-unit fixed-priority catalog-14-DTE PCS implementation across the frozen eight-symbol panel and dual cost axes
MONTHLY_OPEX_POST_EXPIRY_BROAD_INDEX_DRIFT: exact SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA first-Friday-control next-session five-session 60/40 10-bps three-month-block-bootstrap specification
do_not: reopen closed families without a genuinely new evidence class
retune the frozen breakout panel, signal, match bounds, horizon, split, or cost label before the one-shot holdout decision
peek reserved holdout outcomes outside the one-shot validator
price options before the untouched holdout advances to F2
treat capability-only completion as strategy progress
promote discovery-only survivors to the capital path
force paper under failing RTH filters
densify through burst-stop without a new written reassessment
notes: The first experiment advanced only to F1_TRAIN/L0; option pricing deliberately did not run.
The next wake must resolve the frozen untouched holdout as F2 advance or exact-family close.
